metadata.title: Miro Mariapori - Software Developer
metadata.description: I am a software developer focused on modern full-stack web development, automations, and practical software solutions. Explore my skills, experience, and projects.

structuredData.description: A software developer focused on modern full-stack web development, automations, and practical software solutions.

hero.name: Miro Mariapori
intro: I am an information and communications technology engineering student graduating in summer 2026, with my strongest area of expertise being modern full-stack web development. I build web applications, automations, and software solutions for practical needs.

I am currently working on my engineering thesis on autonomous vehicle software in collaboration with the Finnish National Defence University. I have gained experience through an internship as well as several years of freelance projects.

whatIDo.title: What I do
description: I design and implement software solutions from start to finish. I am skilled in both frontend and backend development, and my toolkit includes modern frameworks and technologies. This website, too, was built with Next.js.

I enjoy being involved in every stage of implementation, from planning to deployment. I am especially motivated by creating technical solutions that serve real needs and also work well from the user's perspective.

howIWork.title: How I work
description: I value clear code, sensible structure, and solutions that remain usable beyond the first version. In my work, I balance quality, speed, and practicality.

I use AI tools to support ideation, speed up work, review code, and reduce repetitive tasks. However, I do not see them as a substitute for understanding: I want to know what I am building, why it works, and how problems are fixed.
I work well independently, but I also enjoy working in a team. I value sharing knowledge, helping others, and continuous learning.

experience.title: Experience
description: During my internship, I developed a web application for healthcare needs from the ground up. In the project, I learned about designing a complete application, understanding customer needs, building user interfaces, considering information security, and practical software development.

As a freelance software developer, I have implemented automation solutions, websites, and plugins based on customer needs. These projects have especially developed my ability to listen to customers, quickly identify the core problem, and independently carry a solution through to completion.

education.title: Education
description: Bachelor of Engineering, Information and Communications Technology
Major: Software Engineering
Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
Estimated graduation: summer 2026

AboutPage.title: About me
AboutPage.description: I am an information and communications technology engineering student majoring in software engineering. I am especially enthusiastic about building useful, reliable, and well-executed applications. My strongest area of expertise is full-stack web development, and I want to further develop my skills especially in the practical application of AI, data-driven features, and automation. It is important to me to write code that is easy to understand, maintain, and build upon.

metadata.title: Contact
metadata.description: Contact Miro Mariapori: email, phone, LinkedIn, and GitHub. Let's discuss software development, collaboration, and new ideas.

ContactPage.title: Contact
ContactPage.description: Do you have a project, job opportunity, or question in mind? Feel free to get in touch. I am happy to discuss software development, collaboration, and new ideas.
ContactPage.vCardQrAlt: QR code containing Miro Mariapori's vCard

metadata.title: CV
metadata.description: Miro Mariapori's CV: education, work experience, technical skills, and project details.

general.name: Miro Mariapori
general.title: Software Developer | Full-stack
general.summary: I am an information and communications technology engineering student graduating in summer 2026, with my strongest area of expertise being modern full-stack web development. I have built web applications, automations, APIs, and customer-specific software solutions during my internship and in freelance projects. My strengths include understanding larger systems, clear implementation, and building solutions that fit practical needs. I am currently working on my engineering thesis on autonomous vehicle software in collaboration with the Finnish National Defence University.

core: Design and implementation of software solutions
Automation solutions and use of AI

description: Developed a web application for healthcare needs from the ground up as part of a rehabilitation-related software solution
Participated in application design, user interface development, backend development, and solving practical customer needs
Built and maintained a GraphQL backend that enabled communication between applications and backend services
Designed and implemented solutions for processing motion data to analyze exercises and provide user feedback
Implemented a web-based 3D exercise editor where physiotherapy movements could be designed using a humanoid model
Participated in the development of browser-based 3D visualizations and Unity application development
Took information security and the handling of sensitive user data into account in the implementation
Implement customer-specific software solutions, automations, websites, and plugins based on customer needs
Build solutions that emphasize understanding the customer's problem, practical implementation, and independently completing the project
Developed a Python-based Telegram bot for automated data collection and data processing
Built and maintained WordPress-based solutions, such as custom plugins and platform-specific customizations
Evaluated the relevance and quality of online advertisements in relation to user searches in an international quality assurance environment
Worked in time-critical air freight tasks, including freight handling, customs-related processes, and shipment sorting
Programmed coordinate measuring machines, performed product measurements, and assisted with customer communication and sales-related tasks

projects.name: Autonomous vehicle software (thesis, ongoing)
description: Developing autonomous vehicle software as an engineering thesis in collaboration with the Finnish National Defence University
The work relates to autonomous operation, real-time systems, and vehicle control. More detailed implementation information is restricted due to the confidential nature of the project

projects.name: TKIO-Finder
description: Built a full-stack platform that improves the discoverability of Metropolia University of Applied Sciences' research and innovation projects
Implemented search, filtering, and matchmaking features using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Added Google OAuth2 authentication for secure and user-friendly login
Deployed and maintained backend services in a self-managed environment, including server-side infrastructure management

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering, Information and Communications Technology
description: Major: Software Engineering
Metropolia University of Applied Sciences

metadata.title: Projects
metadata.description: Selected work, research projects, and software projects.

ProjectsPage.title: Projects
ProjectsPage.description: Selected work, research, and software projects.

projects.name: Gamified Joint Rehabilitation, Analysis and Training (GameRAT)
projects.summary: A healthcare technology project combining XR, web-based 3D tooling, GraphQL services, and neural-network-based motion analysis to support physiotherapy and rehabilitation.
description: Developed a full-stack healthcare platform for designing and delivering physiotherapy exercises within an XR-based rehabilitation system.
Built and maintained a GraphQL backend supporting real-time communication between XR applications and backend services.
Created an interactive web-based 3D exercise editor using a humanoid model for custom physiotherapy movement design.
Contributed to Unity-based XR development and implemented browser-based 3D visualizations with Three.js.
Designed and implemented a neural-network-based motion analysis system trained on 1000+ physiotherapy exercises, providing intuitive feedback on exercise performance.
Implemented authentication and data protection mechanisms for handling sensitive patient-related information.

projects.name: TKIO-Finder
projects.summary: A web-based platform improving discoverability of research and innovation projects at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences, featuring search, filtering, and matchmaking capabilities.
description: Built a full-stack platform improving discoverability of research and innovation projects at Metropolia University of Applied Sciences
Implemented search, filtering, and matchmaking features using React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL
Added Google OAuth2 authentication for secure and user-friendly access
Deployed and maintained backend services in a self-hosted environment, including server-side infrastructure management

projects.name: Personal Portfolio
projects.summary: A multilingual personal portfolio built with Next.js to present my projects, skills, and experience in Finnish and English.
description: Designed and developed a multilingual portfolio website for presenting my projects, skills, and experience
Built a responsive interface with CSS Modules, keeping the layout simple, maintainable, and easy to scan
Added page-specific metadata, canonical and alternate language links, and JSON-LD structured data for SEO
Deployed the site on Vercel and added Vercel Analytics for lightweight visitor insights
